name: slicer-skills
description: Slice-first workflow skills for coding agents.

interface.shortDescription: Slice-first workflow skills for coding agents
interface.longDescription: Slicer Skills helps coding agents scout context in a read-only pass, use checkpoints for meaningful decisions, plan work in reviewable slices, execute one approved slice at a time, and debug from root cause before fixing.
defaultPrompt: Use $slicer-planning to split this into slices.
Use $slicer-debugging to investigate this failure before editing.
